zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench於1434年5月28日出生在英國諾福爾可柏斯頓時，他的父親John Yelverton19歲，母親Margery Morley18歲。他於大約1463年與Anne Paston結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1481年7月9日在英國諾福爾可盧加姆享年47歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可盧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench于1434年5月28日出生在英国諾福爾可柏斯頓时，他的父亲John Yelverton19岁，母亲Margery Morley18岁。他于大约1463年与Anne Paston结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1481年7月9日在英国諾福爾可盧加姆享年47岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可盧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench was born on 28 May 1434, in Paston, Norfolk, England, his father, John Yelverton, was 19 and his mother, Margery Morley, was 18. He married Anne Paston about 1463. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 9 July 1481, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Rougham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench est né le 28 mai 1434, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Yelverton, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margery Morley, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Anne Paston environ 1463. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 juillet 1481, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench am 28. Mai 1434 in Paston, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Yelverton 19 und seine Mutter Margery Morley 18. Er hat um 1463 Anne Paston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Juli 1481 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Rougham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Rougham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench è nato il il 28 maggio 1434 nel Paston, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Yelverton, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Margery Morley, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Anne Paston circa 1463. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 luglio 1481, nel Rougham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Rougham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Benchが1434年5月28日にイギリスノーフォルクプアストンで生まれた時，父John Yelvertonは19歳，母Margery Morleyは18歳であった。約1463年にAnne Pastonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1481年7月9日にイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで47歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクロウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench(이)가 1434년 5월 28일 영국 노르폴크 파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Yelverton(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Morley(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1463년 Anne Paston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 7월 9일 영국 노르폴크 루그함에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 루그함에 묻혔다.

pt.28 May 1434–9 July 1481: 28 de maio de 1434–9 de julho de 1481
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench nasceu em 28 de maio de 1434, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Yelverton, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margery Morley, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Paston aproximadamente 1463. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de julho de 1481, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench родился 28 мая 1434 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Yelverton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Morley, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Paston около 1463 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 июля 1481 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия.

es.28 May 1434–9 July 1481: 28 de mayo de 1434–9 de julio de 1481
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Yelverton Justice Of The Kings Bench nació el 28 de mayo de 1434, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Yelverton, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margery Morley, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Anne Paston aproximadamente 1463. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de julio de 1481, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
